meaning: quota; limit (upper or lower); to set a quota; to set a limit
sentence: 每张信用卡每月都有消费限额。
pinyin: Měi zhāng xìn yòng kǎ měi yuè dōu yǒu xiāo fèi xiàn é.
english: Every credit card has a monthly spending limit.

sentence: 买火车票需要实名购票。
pinyin: Mǎi huǒ chē piào xū yào shí míng gòu piào.
english: Buying train tickets requires real-name registration.

meaning: to translate and edit; translator-editor; (computing) to compile (sour
sentence: 他修改完代码后重新编译了程序。
pinyin: Tā xiū gǎi wán dài mǎ hòu chóng xīn biān yì le chéng xù.
english: After finishing the code edits, he recompiled the program.

sentence: 这个地区气候属于大陆性气候，冬冷夏热。
pinyin: Zhè ge dì qū qì hòu shǔ yú dà lù xìng qì hòu, dōng lěng xià rè.
english: The climate of this region is continental — cold winters and hot summers.

meaning: system for identifying users (on a rail network, the Internet etc)
sentence: 网上注册账号要遵守实名制规定。
pinyin: Wǎng shàng zhù cè zhàng hào yào zūn shǒu shí míng zhì guī dìng.
english: Registering an online account must comply with the real-name system requirements.
